title: ISC BIND security advisory (AV26-732)
description: On July 22, 2026, ISC published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: BIND Supported Preview Edition  versions 9.11.3-S1 to 9.18.50-S1
BIND Supported Preview Edition  versions 9.16.8-S1 to 9.18.50-S1
BIND Supported Preview Edition  versions 9.18.11-S1 to 9.18.50-S1
BIND Supported Preview Edition  versions 9.20.9-S1 to 9.20.24-S1
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
